should_trigger: Evaluate this SKILL.md before I enable the package
Run a skill quality gate for frontmatter, safety language, scripts, and tests
Check all skills under this package root for blocking validation failures
should_not_trigger: Inventory installed Pi skills and propose merge or prune candidates
Draft a new skill from a successful trajectory
Record this skill failure as a PATCH.md-style refinement proposal

ambiguous.prompt: Check which skills are weak and need cleanup
ambiguous.decision: Use skill-evaluator for contract validation of specific skill files; use skill-bank-manager for inventory and lifecycle cleanup planning across a skill bank.
ambiguous.reason: Both report skill issues, but evaluator produces pass/warn/fail validation while bank manager produces lifecycle recommendations.

notes: Structural quality gates and runnable skill tests should route here.
